Follows a comprehensive structured approach: Executive Summary -> Tool Selection & Budget -> Architecture Overview -> 4-Week Implementation Plan (Week 1: Metrics, Week 2: Logging, Week 3: Tracing, Week 4: Alerting/SLOs) -> Key Metrics -> Dashboard Inventory -> Scaling Considerations -> Day-2 Operations -> Common Pitfalls -> Quick-Start Checklist.
